creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 224904
patch for x11-themes/kde-icons-nuovext2

The patch attached to this pr(1) removes (the now)
unnecessary LICENSE_FILE declaration which pkg-fallout@
(check-sanity) tried to tell me to do.

See patch attached for greater detail.

Changes
Makefile (remove LICENSE_FILE)

That's it.

Thanks!

--Chris
